title: coix lacryma-jobi var. lacryma-jobi
intro: Coix lacryma-jobi var. lacryma-jobi, also known as Job's Tears or Adlay, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Asia and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic effects. The health benefits of Coix lacryma-jobi var. lacryma-jobi include reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders, such as diarrhea and constipation. Job's Tears can be prepared as herbal tea, capsules, or supplements, or used topically as an oil or cream, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
